title: Salesforce Add Contact to Campaign Node Freezes
symptom: When attempting to use the Salesforce 'Add Contact to Campaign' node, the page becomes unresponsive and displays an error message. This occurs even in a simplified workflow with only two nodes.
applies_when: Using Salesforce 'Add Contact to Campaign' node
Workflow contains a significant number of campaigns
not_this_if: Node is functioning correctly with fewer campaigns
root_cause: The node may be attempting to fetch a large list of campaigns, which can lead to performance issues and timeouts, especially if there are many campaigns in the Salesforce org. This can cause the page to freeze and become unresponsive.
fix_steps: Check the number of campaigns in your Salesforce org and consider reducing them if excessive.
Monitor server logs for any timeout or connection issues related to the websocket.
Consider using an HTTP POST call as an alternative to the Salesforce node if the issue persists.
agent_instruction: Investigate the number of campaigns and server logs, and consider using an HTTP POST call if necessary.
